Bi-Weekly Report
• Capesize futures curve now points to peak rates later in the year - The considerable downside adjustment in the
futures curve has been the main event over the last few weeks as spot rates have failed to rally to any substantial
degree to justify the prompt futures premiums. Market expectations for a strong third quarter had mainly reflected
memories of last year's impressive rally rather than any fundamental shift in market balance. Historically, the third

Bi-Weekly Report
• Capesize futures curve now points to peak rates later in the year - The considerable downside adjustment in the
futures curve has been the main event over the last few weeks as spot rates have failed to rally to any substantial
degree to justify the prompt futures premiums. Market expectations for a strong third quarter had mainly reflected
memories of last year's impressive rally rather than any fundamental shift in market balance.
